scenes.narration: So merit week's coming up, and if you haven't checked who's below minimum or whether any manager earns less than their team, you're not alone. ShiftWorks HR is built for that last-minute comp review.
You pull your export from Workday or whatever payroll system you use, drop it in, and we map the columns automatically. No IT project needed.
About a minute later you're looking at cycle readiness in the real product, with critical flags up top and a clear picture of what still needs attention before you lock merit.
From there you drill into below-minimum employees and see every name, department, and dollar gap in the same issue table your comp team uses every day.
When DEI questions come up, gender and race median pay gaps are already here by group, pulled straight from the columns in your file.
Location pay works the same way, with median pay by office and gaps across cities, so you're not building a separate geographic analysis.
And when leadership wants a summary, you export a one-click PDF with risk level, budget exposure, and the findings they'll actually ask about.
Try it free at shiftworkshr.com with your own roster. No credit card required.
